overall.description: A cinematic view of a grand Gothic dining hall from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring floating candles, large stained glass windows, and students in dark robes seated at long wooden house tables eating and conversing. Warm sunlight streams through the windows illuminating the stone interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand Gothic dining hall with house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from a fixed position overlooking the students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes eating at the table
group of students conversing while seated

entered.detail: large ornate Gothic windows with colorful panes allowing sunlight to stream through
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air beneath the high ceiling
tall stone walls with Gothic architectural details and arches
lengthy house tables with green table runners set with plates and food
vertical banners hanging on the walls between windows

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent Gothic dining hall filled with students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. Warm morning light streams through towering stained glass windows on the left, while hundreds of floating candles illuminate the high vaulted ceiling. Students eat and converse at the house tables covered in green runners, creating a bustling yet orderly atmosphere in this grand medieval hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, immersive gaze across a magnificent Gothic dining hall where morning light and floating candles create a warm, scholarly atmosphere. It begins by capturing the grand scale of the vaulted ceiling, where hundreds of flickering candles drift above the bustling activity below. As the view settles, the camera emphasizes the interplay of light streaming through towering stained glass windows on the left, illuminating the stone interior. The scene then focuses on the long wooden house tables draped in green runners, where students in dark robes eat and converse in an orderly yet lively manner.
